lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: Hey there, what can I do for ya?

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: My name is Drew and I man this here grinding machine. I call her Sandstorm!

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: I can also look after any buckets ya want me to.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: Me and Sandstorm go way back, we started off back in the desert mining camp, I was a slave and I had the honour of looking after Sandstorm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you and Sandstorm get out of the mining camp?

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: Well, because I was in charge of looking after Sandstorm, I was able to look at the inner workings.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: While the guards weren't looking, I would take apart Sandstorm piece by piece and place the pieces in boxes and barrels, when Sandstorms inners were all gutted, I tricked the cart driver by telling him cart jokes.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: So, he didn't bother to check his cargo and I was able to board as he was driving off.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: Anyway, that's all in the past. Can I help ya with anything else?

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: You haven't got any buckets for me to hold.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: Ya don't have any buckets of sand to withdraw. Ya need to give me empty buckets, and grind sandstone in my grinder, then I'll sell ya buckets of sand.

lines.speaker: Drew
lines.text: I have [number] of your buckets and you've ground enough sandstone for [number] buckets of sand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing sorry. I have to be going now.
